full_text:
Liu Chong 劉寵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Chong (劉寵). During the Yellow Scarves rebellion he created his own kingdom. Killed by Yuan Shu. Liu Chong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
